title: Client For DreamsFeather 梦落空羽客户端
description: This is the client for the DreamsFeather of Minecraft.
body:
# Client For DreamsFeather 梦落空羽客户端
## Why choose this And what is inside 为什么选择这个以及有什么在里面
- We have included a small selection of mods from the MASA group to enhance the player experience on the server. Additionally, we have integrated the Voice Chat mod to enable seamless in-game voice communication. The AllMusic mod has also been added, allowing players to listen to songs requested by others during gameplay, bringing joy to the sometimes monotonous survival experience. Our key feature is the extremely compact size—despite its minimal footprint, it offers a wide range of functionalities. Welcome to choose The Client For DreamsFeather.
## Usage Statement 使用声明
- This is the client for the DreamsFeather of Minecraft. Use the client we provide to get the best experience on the server. While using it, please pay attention to the usage agreements and redistribution requirements of various mods, and do not violate the agreements. You are welcome to join our Tencent QQ group (339212469) to participate and connect with fellow players. Thank you for your cooperation, and we wish you a pleasant experience.
- 这是我的世界梦落空羽服务器的客户端，使用我们提供的客户端以获得服务器内最佳的体验，当您使用过程中，请注意各类mod的使用协议以及二次分发的要求，请勿违反协议，您可加入我们的腾讯QQ群：339212469参与我们的游玩，感谢您的配合，祝您生活愉快
- zmusic-fabric-1.21.8-3.5.0.jar is not available for download on Modrinth, so we have provided the open-source link. We strictly adhere to the GPL-v3 license, make all code publicly available, and present to you the open-source repository of this mod.
- zmusic-fabric-1.21.8-3.5.0.jar因在Modrinth上没有下载渠道，故附上开源链接，我们严格遵守GPL-v3协议，公开所有代码，并且向您展示该mod的开源仓库
## Client Usage Tutorial 使用教程
1. - Download the mrpack file we provide and choose the version that best suits your needs. For mobile devices, it is recommended to select the minimum required package, while the full package is available for computer users（This maybe not）.
   - 下载我们提供的mrpack文件，自行选择您最需要的版本，如手机端请尽量选择最低运行包，电脑端可选择完整包
2. - Drag the mrpack file into your launcher, or select the "Import Modpack" button (or a similar option) in the launcher to import the downloaded mrpack file. Then, follow the prompts in the launcher to complete the setup.
   - 将mrpack文件拖入您的启动器，或选择启动器的导入整合包等类型的按钮，导入您下载的mrpack文件，并按照启动器提示完成设置
3. - Launch your game. Congratulations, you have completed the installation process for DreamsFeather client. Thank you for choosing us, and we wish you a pleasant gaming experience.
   - 启动您的游戏，恭喜您完成了梦落空羽客户端的安装流程，感谢您的选择，祝您游戏愉快
##   Sincere Thanks 特别感谢
- Minecraft Online Fangkuai_Xiaoniu
- Minecraft Online EXCIXIN
- Minecraft Online ning_meng_qwq
